mapper.sql: a.id as id, a.addtime as addtime, a.userid as userid, a.tablename as tablename, a.title as title, a.content as content, a.type as type, a.refid as refid, a.reftable as reftable, a.isread as isread, a.readtime as readtime
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tongzhi WHERE userid = #{userid} AND tablename = #{tablename} AND isread = 0
